## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Maintenance
- [ ] Security/dependency hygiene
- [ ] Jurisdiction profile
- [ ] Drafting recipe

## Checks

- [ ] I ran `npm test`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I ran `npm audit`
- [ ] I used fictional or anonymised examples only
- [ ] I preserved human-review warnings and legal-advice disclaimers
- [ ] I updated documentation or examples where relevant
- [ ] The project remains model-agnostic and provider-neutral

## Notes for reviewers

Add anything the maintainer should review carefully.
